Feature_Description: The F1AP UE Context Setup procedure is initiated by the gNB-CU to establish a UE context in the gNB-DU. This procedure is fundamental for various UE state transitions and mobility events, including UE initial access, RRC inactive to active transitions, SgNB addition, and Small Data Transmission (SDT) procedures.
The gNB-DU responds to the gNB-CU to confirm the successful setup of the UE context and provide necessary configurations.
Feature_Objectives: To establish a UE context in the gNB-DU.
To provide the gNB-DU with necessary information for UE operation (e.g., SRB/DRB IDs, CellGroupConfig, F1 UL TEIDs, serving PLMN ID).
To receive RLC/MAC/PHY configurations and F1 DL TEIDs from the gNB-DU.
To support various procedures such as RRC inactive to active transitions, UE initial access, SgNB addition, and SDT.
Feature_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU initiates the UE Context Setup procedure by preparing and sending the F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU to establish the UE context.

The UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message may include the gNB-CU UE F1AP ID, SRB ID(s) and DRB ID(s) to be setup, CellGroupConfig, serving PLMN ID (for NG-RAN sharing/SNPNs), stored F1 UL TEIDs, sidelink configuration container for PC5 Relay RLC channel configuration (for U2N Remote UE), source cell group configuration (for SgNB addition), an indication for SCG activation or deactivation (during SN Addition), and may encapsulate the SecurityModeCommand message (during UE Initial Access).
The candidate gNB-DU receives the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message and establishes the UE context for the UE.
The candidate gNB-DU responds to the gNB-CU with the F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.
The UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message contains the RLC/MAC/PHY configuration of SRB and DRBs provided by the gNB-DU, F1 DL TEIDs, and the SCG status (if SCG activation was requested).
The gNB-CU handles the received UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message, completing the UE context establishment in the gNB-DU.

Code_Instructions.description: Data structure defining the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message format, used for encoding the request on the gNB-CU and decoding it on the gNB-DU.
Data structure defining the F1AP UE Context Setup Response message format, used for encoding the response on the gNB-DU and decoding it on the gNB-CU.
Helper function used by the gNB-CU RRC layer to construct the content of the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message based on the UE's context and required configurations.
Helper function responsible for preparing (e.g., serializing/encoding) and sending the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message from the RRC layer to the F1AP layer for transmission to the gNB-DU.
Helper function responsible for processing (e.g., deserializing/decoding) a received F1AP UE Context Setup Response message and passing the parsed information to the RRC layer for further handling.

Utility function for deriving the gNB security key (SKgNB). This is a fundamental cryptographic operation needed when security context is established or updated, which can be part of the UE Context Setup procedure (e.g., when SecurityModeCommand is encapsulated).

Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: During UE Initial Access, the SecurityModeCommand message may be encapsulated within the F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message.
